title: move_to_target command
description: Move to the position of certain entity on the current map.
markdownDescription: *Move* to the position of certain entity on the current map.

prefixItems.title: move_to_target command
prefixItems.description: Move to the position of certain entity on the current map.
prefixItems.markdownDescription: *Move* to the position of certain entity on the current map.

target.title: Target Entity
target.description: Entity ID or Entity Alias or reference to blackboard
target.markdownDescription: *Entity ID* or *Entity Alias* or reference to *blackboard value*

upd_path_ms.title: Path Update Interval in ms
upd_path_ms.description: How often (in ms) the pathfinding route to the target is recalculated. Default is 5000.
upd_path_ms.markdownDescription: How often (in ms) the pathfinding route to the target is recalculated. Default is `5000`.

max_time_s.title: Maximum time (in sec) to reach the target
max_time_s.description: Maximum time (in sec) to reach the target. After this time the movement stops.
max_time_s.markdownDescription: Maximum time (in sec) to reach the target. After this time the movement stops.

proximity_tl.title: Proximity in tiles
proximity_tl.description: How close to come to the target position in tiles. Default is 0.
proximity_tl.markdownDescription: How close to come to the target position in tiles. Default is `0`.
